content.en:
After the Qingyang Domain Ancestor agreed, the Sparrow Battle Domain Ancestor left the Chaotic Void River.

Subsequently, the Bird Battle Domain Ancestor summoned the other four-star kings of the Ghost Fox Organization, if these four-star kings could defeat the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, there would be no need to let the Qingyang Domain Ancestor take action, and the Ghost Fox Organization would not need to give the Qingyang Domain Ancestor the rewards requested.

The other side.

Ye Tian's copy body kept shuttling through the Dark Forbidden Realm to the Dark Sanctuary.

Ye Tian's speed was very fast, and after tens of thousands of years, he came to the Forbidden River on the periphery of the Dark Sacred Domain.

Whoa!!!!

The forbidden river turned into countless forbidden forces rolled in the forbidden river, and the waves hit the void one after another, making this void extremely chaotic.

Although the Forbidden River is not very long, due to the chaos of the void here, it is impossible to travel through it.

Otherwise, many domain ancestors would choose to shuttle over and cross the forbidden river.

But due to the chaos of the void, they could only choose to fly over, and the speed of the flight could not reach the level of fast.

Therefore, it is very dangerous to fly over the Forbidden River in this way, and if you are not careful, you will be killed by the large number of forbidden creatures of the Forbidden River.

Ye Tian stepped into the Forbidden River in one step, and even though he hid his breath, he still attracted the attention of the forbidden creatures.

"Sure enough, it is rumored that the Forbidden River is very special, and any concealment secret technique will be weakened countless times, and it is impossible to hide the forbidden creatures here!"

Ye Tian muttered.

There used to be a half-step domain ancestor level saint endowed person, who used hidden holy skills, all of them were discovered, if it wasn't for the life-saving thing, and someone rescued it in time, otherwise that holy endowed person would also die.

Bang!!!!!

A forbidden creature resembling an octopus appears, the size of a small world.

Ye Tian's body shape was like a speck of dust in the eyes of the other party, maybe not as good as a speck of dust.

I saw that the other party's tentacles filled with countless black scales slapped in an instant, as if they were going to kill Ye Tian with one blow.

"Die!"

Ye Tian used his holy technique to suppress the gods, and with just one blow, he shattered the soul of this forbidden creature and killed the other party.

Along the way, a large number of forbidden creatures attacked Ye Tian, but their strength was very weak, basically they were all forbidden creatures at the top domain ancestor level, and there were also some forbidden creatures at the elite domain ancestor level, which were like ants in Ye Tian's eyes.

Whoa!!!

The corpses of forbidden creatures fell from the void one by one, but so many forbidden creatures fell, but they still did not make the forbidden creatures afraid.

In the Forbidden River, the forbidden creatures here don't have much intelligence at all, only the instincts of the forbidden creatures.

Unless it is a forbidden creature with a relatively high bloodline level, so that they dare not make a move, otherwise they will not stop.

Soon, Ye Tian crossed the Forbidden River, and he was not injured at all, and it was very relaxed.

After all, normal Supreme Domain Ancestors can cross the Forbidden River, unless they are unlucky enough to encounter forbidden creatures at the level of Supreme Domain Ancestors.

But the Forbidden River has no binding force on the Supreme Domain Ancestor, and if it really reaches the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, the forbidden creatures will not stay in the Forbidden River, and they have long gone to find opportunities.

Of course, the Forbidden River must have forbidden creatures at the level of the Supreme Domain Ancestor.

But for Ye Tian, if the Supreme Domain Ancestor is also an ant, unless he can reach the combat power of the Supreme Domain Ancestor at the level of the Supreme Strength List, he is qualified to let him pay attention to it.

As soon as he entered the Dark Sacred Domain, Ye Tian immediately felt the difference between this place and the Daoshan Realm.

"The Chaos Vitality is too strong!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

However, unlike the Dao Mountain Realm, the Dark Forbidden Domain is also filled with a strong dark forbidden power, and for ordinary creatures, the void of the Dark Sanctuary is a forbidden area, and once you enter, you will die.

Because of this, there are no continents in the Dark Sanctuary, and they are all composed of a large number of giant cities and countless worlds.

Ye Tian also came to the Dark Sacred Domain for the first time, and he did not fly around, but notified the battle gate as soon as possible.

Not long after, one of the strongest domain ancestors of the Battle Gate appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Zhanmen Jingyu Domain Ancestor has seen Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors!"

Jingyu Domain Ancestor said respectfully.

He is not a core member of the Battle Gate, just an ordinary Domain Ancestor, and thanks to the fact that his parents are the strongest Domain Ancestor, he is qualified to join the Battle Gate.

But Ye Tian's strength was much stronger than his parents, so he naturally didn't dare to be disrespectful to Ye Tian.

"Lead the way!"

Ye Tian said lightly.

"Yes!"

Jingyu Domain Ancestor Ying Dao.

Under the leadership of Jingyu Domain Ancestor, the two of them leaped over a long territory, and finally arrived at the headquarters of the Battle Gate, the War Ancestor Realm!

The Battle Ancestor Realm is an Ancestral Realm, above the Saint Realm.

The cultivation environment here far surpasses the Holy Realm, and it is precisely because of this that the Battle Gate can give birth to a large number of powerhouses.

In fact, how powerful the power of the battle gate was, Ye Tian still didn't know very well.

After all, he had been staying in the War Realm Tower before, and the War Realm Tower was just a holy relic of the Battle Gate, how many strong people were in it?

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, this is the Battle Ancestor Realm!"

Jingyu Ancestral Road.

Subsequently, the two entered the War Ancestor Realm.

Entering the Battle Ancestor Realm, Ye Tian obviously felt that the energy here was too strong, much better than the cultivation environment of the Xuanxu Saint Realm.

It is conceivable how many good things can be born in the War Ancestor Realm.

It's no wonder that there are so many domain ancestors in the Ten Great Holy Gates, but not many people go to the Xuanxu Holy Realm, because it's not necessary!

Even if the Xuanxu Saint Realm has a better environment than the ordinary Saint Realm, it is still far inferior to the Ancestral Realm.

If it weren't for the birth of the Soul Saint Realm in the Xuanxu Saint Realm, it would really not be able to attract the people of the Holy Gate.

Soon, Ye Tian came to an area of the Battle Gate Battle Ancestor Realm - Heavenly Domain!

The War Ancestor Realm is divided into five regions, the Yellow Domain, the Xuan Domain, the Region, the Heaven Domain, and the Ancestral Domain, and the Domain Ancestors generally live in the Heavenly Domain, the Xuan Domain belongs to the members above the Dao Ancestor, and the Yellow Domain belongs to countless ordinary beings.

These creatures are all descendants of the powerhouses of the Battle Gate, and they have developed slowly, and if they can give birth to any geniuses, they can easily join the Battle Gate.

The Ancestral Domain is the place where the Ancestors, the Ancestors of the Superior Domain, and the Ancestors of the Invincible Domain cultivate, the Ancestral Domain is not large, but it is the area with the most abundant resources and the best cultivation environment in the War Ancestor Realm, and it is the real first treasure land in the War Ancestor Realm.

Ye Tiancai is at the ancestral level of the strong domain, so he is naturally not qualified to enter the ancestral domain to cultivate, but occasionally entering the ancestral domain to meet the high-level of the battle gate is still allowed.

After coming to the War Ancestor Realm, Ye Tian first went through the specific procedures of the Battle Gate, and received a mansion of his own in the War Ancestor Realm.

This should have been done a long time ago, but it was delayed because he had not been in the Dark Sanctuary.

Soon after, all the formalities were completed.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Ancestral Domain and visited the Ancestor of the Blood Gang Domain!
